title: Dobll
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Dobll''''' was a group of four [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that transferred food during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of its base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] when it was [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|attacked]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. They accompanied [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corvette Group]] [[Crescent (corvette group)|''Crescent'']] in their evacuation of the base. However, they were all destroyed by Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]].

The loss of food meant the Rebel Alliance needed supplies. This led them to [[Operation Grain Snatch]] which was stealing food from [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]] and returning [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] [[Grain/Legends|grain]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Behind the scenes==
It may be possible to save at least some of the freighters in the gameplay. If the player increases the speed of their craft significantly, they can ward off the attackers before all four vessels are destroyed. However, the destruction of all four freighters is scripted and therefore is the canonical outcome of the attack.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
